title: Capability record
description: One curated, reusable capability derived from a catalogued source, stored as catalog/capabilities/<id>.json.

id.description: Kebab-case identifier; must match the filename without extension.

status.description: Local capability status. Must be consistent with the linked catalogue decision; do_not_use/unresolved sources never become capability records.

canonical_repo_or_product.description: Must match a display_name or canonical_repo_or_product value in catalog/repositories.csv.

local_modifications.description: What, if anything, was changed from upstream. Empty string means unmodified.

compatible_profiles.description: profile_id values (from profiles/*.json) this capability is relevant and safe for. No cap on length.
